content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_CAMPAIGN]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_CAMPAIGN]
( 
	[CampaignID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CampaignName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BidStrategy] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Objective] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BuyingType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CanUseSpendCap] [bit]  NULL,
	[SmartPromotionType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[EffectiveStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BudgetRebalanceFlag] [bit]  NULL,
	[SpecialAdCateogry] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ConfiguredStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CreatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[StartTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[StopTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UpdatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LifetimeBudget] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BudgetRemaining] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ToplineID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[SourceCampaignID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[IsSKADNetworkAttribution] [bit]  NULL,
	[CanCreateBrandLiftStudy] [bit]  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
